basic_details.job_title: RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 119 Posts

basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 27-06-2026 Application Start Date: 15-07-2026 (Tentative) Last Date to Apply: 14-08-2026 (23:59 hrs)

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Age Limit: 20 to 33 years (as on 01.07.2026) Medical Standard: A-2 medical category is required Nationality: Indian Citizen

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) Aptitude Test (if applicable) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Click on CEN 03/2026 Section Controller Recruitment link
Register using valid email ID and mobile number

faq.question: Q1. What is RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a railway recruitment drive conducted by RRB for Section Controller posts under CEN 03/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released?
faq.answer: A total of 119 vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a graduation degree in any discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit?
Q5. What is the salary of Section Controller?
Q6. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: CBT, aptitude test (if applicable), document verification, and medical test.
